arts.ttl: Zubimendi HIJACK? Arsenal update as Real Madrid, Liverpool stance revealed
arts.sum: There is no risk of Liverpool or Real Madrid hijacking Arsenal's deal to sign Martin Zubimendi as things stand, according to a report. Zubimendi has a closer attachment to his team than most modern footballers and he rejected Liverpool last summer despite the fact that even Real Sociedad had seemingly accepted that he would likely leave.

arts.sum: Liverpool move seven points ahead of Arsenal in the Premier League title race following their 2-1 victory against Wolverhampton Wanderers on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Risky: Liverpool identify underwhelming winger transfer to replace Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly have a slightly risky transfer target in mind to help them potentially replace Mohamed Salah if he leaves this summer. arts.ttl: Liverpool star offers himself to club – Transfer self-marketing ahead of summer window opening
arts.sum: Liverpool star Luis Diaz has offered himself to Barcelona and told the club he is open to a move in the summer transfer window. That’s according to El Chiringuito and journalist Jose Alvarez, who reports that Diaz’s agents have been speaking to Barcelona and director of football Deco.
